texto: The mind of man has perplexed itself with many hard questions. Is space infinite, and in what sense? Is the material world infinite in extent, and are all places within that extent equally full of matter? Do atoms exist or is matter infinitely divisible?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de James C. Maxwell que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “The mind of man has perplexed itself with many hard questions. Is space infinite, and in what sen…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, man, space, com foco em space e world.

texto: All the mathematical sciences are founded on relations between physical laws and laws of numbers, so that the aim of exact science is to reduce the problems of nature to the determination of quantities by operations with numbers.
explicacao: Citação de James C. Maxwell sobre temas ligados a educacao. “All the mathematical sciences are founded on relations between physical laws and laws of numbers,…” articula educacao, science, determination em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como determination.
